positive: A stylized cosmic landscape featuring a majestic bioluminescent nebula forming a celestial wave cresting over a minimalist, stylized mountain range. The foreground includes floating geometric crystal structures and small silhouettes of stylized nocturnal creatures (like foxes or deer) gazing upwards. The overall mood is ethereal, mysterious, and peaceful. Use high contrast, deep indigo, vibrant turquoise, magenta, and glowing gold accents. The style should be a modern, vector-graphic aesthetic combined with the rich detail of cosmic art, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Clean silhouettes, central composition, symmetrical balance, graphic depth, high detail.
